description: Clean up the Chinook database by archiving and deleting tracks that have never been sold (no records in the 'InvoiceLine' table). Archive these tracks into a new table named 'UnsoldTracksArchive' containing 'TrackId' (Integer), 'Name' (Text), 'Composer' (Text), and 'UnitPrice' (Decimal/Double) columns. Ensure all references to these tracks are removed from the 'PlaylistTrack' table before deleting them from the 'Track' table. Save the changes to the database.
